(e.g., communication, problem-solving, adaptability, etc)","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1791128812","title":"What technical skills or expertise do you anticipate will be most in demand for Bitcoin roles in the next 3-5 years?","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-544427460","title":"Beyond technical skills, what traits or experiences make someone stand out as a potential hire for your team?","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1191530007","title":"How competitive is it to attract top Bitcoin talent compared to other sectors (e.g., traditional finance, big tech) in the fiat world?","description":"","type":"scale","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":1,"max":5,"minLabel":"Not as competitive","maxLabel":"A lot more competitive"}},{"id":"item-884585489","title":"How important is it for candidates to share Bitcoin’s ethos (e.g., decentralization, sovereignty, sound money principles) for roles within your organization?","description":"","type":"scale","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":1,"max":5,"minLabel":"Low","maxLabel":"High"}},{"id":"item-1151498772","title":"If you could access a pool of proven Bitcoin professionals, would you check there first before posting a new job?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Yes, definitely - it would save us a ton of time","No, we’d continue with our current hiring methods"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-202382386","title":"Do new hires generally need to be deeply aligned with Bitcoin's ethos, or is professional expertise alone sufficient for most roles? (Select one)","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Deep ethos alignment is crucial for all roles.","Deep ethos alignment is crucial for some roles (e.g., leadership, community-facing), but professional expertise is sufficient for others (e.g., some technical roles)","Professional expertise is generally sufficient, regardless of ethos alignment."],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1118137504","title":"Are candidates showing a preference for being paid in bitcoin, fiat, or a mix of both?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Strong preference for Bitcoin (majority/all compensation)","Preference for a mix (significant portion in Bitcoin)","No strong preference, open to either","Preference for fiat (majority/all compensation)","N/A (We only offer one payment method)"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1694798185","title":"If you offer payment in bitcoin, what percentage of new hires typically opt for it? (e.g., \"50%\", \"75%\")","description":"","type":"text","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":1,"max":310005,"minLabel":"Very few","maxLabel":""}}]},{"id":"section-ai","title":"AI","description":"","questions":[{"id":"item-752609065","title":"How has AI affected the roles you're hiring for this year?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["No noticeable change","Some tasks/roles have been automated or replaced","We’ve added new AI-related roles","We now value AI skills across most roles"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-460679171","title":"When evaluating candidates, how important is AI literacy or hands-on experience?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Not important","Nice to have","Increasingly important","Essential for most roles"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1846676331","title":"Would you appreciate it if candidates highlighted specific AI experience (e.g. tools, workflows, automation projects) in their CVs, cover letters, or LinkedIn profiles?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Yes, absolutely","Maybe, depending on the role","No, it’s not relevant to our business"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}}]},{"id":"section-future","title":"Future Outlook & Advice","description":"","questions":[{"id":"item-672452057","title":"What is your biggest challenge when it comes to hiring in the Bitcoin industry?","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1639941029","title":"What advice would you give to companies just starting to hire in the Bitcoin space? Feel free to share your unique insights and lessons learned!","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1267258401","title":"What are your organization's hiring plans for the next 12 months?","description":"","type":"multiple-choice","required":false,"options":["Significant expansion (25%+ increase in headcount)","Moderate expansion (10-24% increase)","Stable headcount (0-9% change)","Slight reduction (up to 9% decrease)","Significant reduction (10%+ decrease)","Uncertain / Don't know"],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"item-1967937546","title":"What advice would you give to job seekers? What should they do or not do in order to increase their chances of getting hired?","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}},{"id":"","title":"Finding a job is one thing — keeping it is another. What advice do you have for someone working in a Bitcoin company for the first time?","description":"What habits, communication styles, or attitudes are absolute must-haves — and which ones are deal-breakers that could get someone fired?","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}}]},{"id":"section-thanks","title":"Thank you!","description":"

We appreciate your time and valuable insights. Together, we’re building the human infrastructure for hyperbitcoinization.

If you'd like to schedule a personal call with Anja to understand how Bitvocation can support you and how we can collaborate, you can do so via calendly.com/virtualanja

Thank you for contributing to this collective proof of work.

Warm regards,
Anja Founder, BITVOCATION

🌐 bitvocation.com
📢 t.me/bitvocationfeed

","questions":[{"id":"item-810369885","title":"Comments, questions, remarks","description":"","type":"paragraph","required":false,"options":[],"scale":{"min":0,"max":0,"minLabel":"","maxLabel":""}}]}]
value.intro:
How to navigate this survey

  • All questions (apart from your email address) are optional. Feel free to skip, but the more detail you share, the more accurate the final picture will be.

  • Use the NEXT and BACK buttons to skip back and forth or click on the sections that you will see on top of the screen. There's also a HOME button on the bottom.

  • Your answers will remain confidential and be analyzed only in aggregated, anonymized form, unless you explicitly agree to be quoted.


Important:

Please use your company email address (not @gmail, @proton, etc.) so we can verify you’re part of a legitimate Bitcoin business.

We will not add you to any mailing list — your email will only be used to send you the final report or follow up for clarification.

Thank you for contributing to this collective Proof of Work for the Bitcoin industry.

Your input helps make our Annual Bitcoin Job Market Report more accurate, more useful, and more representative of the people actually building on Bitcoin.
